infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need camera access to record your lifting sets.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: We need microphone access to record audio with your videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We save your recorded sets to share them with your coach.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Powerlift Assistant to access your camera to record your sets.

plugins.photosPermission: Save your recorded sets so you can send them to your coach.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Save your recorded sets so you can send them to your coach.
